business_description.nature_of_business: Hospitality operations including hotel staff (general, bellhops, doorpersons), restaurant employees, and clerical office personnel

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy Number: WC-HCHP-2025-3350. Rating plan: Large Risk. Interstate rating applies. Experience Modification Factor: 0.94. Total payroll across all classifications: $16,260,471. Expected Losses: $361,806. Classifications rated: 9052 (Hotel — All Other Employees), 9060 (Hotel — Bellhops/Doorpersons), 9082 (Restaurant — NOC), 8810 (Clerical Office Employees — NOC). Calculated Mod Numerator: $367,465; Denominator: $390,920.

positives: Experience modification of 0.94 is below 1.0, indicating better-than-average loss performance relative to peers
Improving claim frequency trend over experience period: 8 claims (2021-2022) → 6 claims (2022-2023) → 2 claims (2023-2024)
Zero excess losses across all three experience years; all losses are primary
No open or incurred-but-not-reported reserves; total paid equals total incurred for all years
Weighting factor of 0.419 under Large Risk rating plan reflects credible loss experience
Interstate rating qualification indicates multi-state operational scale
concerns: Claims present in all three experience years indicating recurring exposure to worker injuries
Highest single-year loss total of $56,343 in 2021-2022 with 8 claims suggests elevated frequency in earlier period
Restaurant (NOC) classification 9082 carries elevated payroll exposure of $3,678,800
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Three-year experience period (2021-2024) reflects 16 total claims with $92,945 total incurred losses across all years. All losses are fully paid with no open reserves. Year-by-year: 2021-2022 — 8 claims, $56,343 incurred; 2022-2023 — 6 claims, $26,662 incurred; 2023-2024 — 2 claims, $9,940 incurred. All incurred losses classified as primary; no excess losses recorded. Valuation date: 2026-03-15.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Insured operates in the hospitality sector under four workers compensation classifications: Class 9052 — Hotel All Other Employees ($9,207,271 payroll, ELR 1.63, D-Ratio 0.28); Class 9060 — Hotel Bellhops and Doorpersons ($1,454,400 payroll, ELR 1.95, D-Ratio 0.29); Class 9082 — Restaurant NOC ($3,678,800 payroll, ELR 1.55, D-Ratio 0.28); Class 8810 — Clerical Office Employees NOC ($1,920,000 payroll, ELR 0.195, D-Ratio 0.17).
